channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tate Myron Collaborates with IAM Worldwide to Promote Youth Wellness
item.description: Tate Myron, a wellness advocate, has joined IAM Worldwide to spearhead initiatives aimed at fostering a culture of wellness among today's youth. The collaboration focuses on integrating holistic healt...

item.title: One man killed and several injured as protesters and law enforcement clash in AJK's Poonch
item.description: A man was killed and several other people were injured after violent clashes broke out between protesters and law enforcement personnel on Saturday along the important Arja-Rawalakot road in Azad Jamm...

item.title: Punjab BJP alleges AAP manipulated urban local body elections through administrative interference
item.description: The ruling BJP in Punjab has accused the Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) government of systematically subverting the electoral process during urban local body elections. BJP State President Kewal Singh Dhillon ...

item.title: Johannesburg Budget Faces Legal Scrutiny Over Unlawful Senior Management Expansion
item.description: DA mayoral candidate Helen Zille has launched a third legal challenge against Johannesburg's 2026/27 budget, alleging the city unlawfully expanded its senior management roles by over 200% despite dire...

item.title: Mass Shooting at Toronto Latin Festival Leaves 2 Dead, Injuries Reported
item.description: A mass shooting occurred at Canada’s largest Latin street festival in Toronto on Saturday, resulting in two deaths and multiple injuries. Police confirmed the incident took place at the Salsa on St. C...

item.title: UFC 329: McGregor faces Holloway after five-year hiatus, Pimblett dominates Saint-Denis
item.description: Conor McGregor made a controversial return to the UFC after a five-year absence, facing former rival Max Holloway at T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas. The welterweight bout marked McGregor's comeback follo...

item.title: US carries out retaliatory strikes after Iran attacks cargo ship and announces closure of the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The United States launched a new round of military strikes against Iranian targets after Iran fired a missile at a Cyprus-flagged cargo vessel attempting to transit the Strait of Hormuz. According to ...

item.title: Kano Pillars Appoint Daniel Ogunmodede as Technical Adviser for 2026-2027 Season
item.description: Kano Pillars have officially appointed Daniel Ogunmodede as their new technical adviser ahead of the 2026-2027 Nigeria Premier Football League (NPFL) season. The 46-year-old replaces Mohammed Babagana...

item.title: U.S. and Iran Escalate Conflict Over Vessel Incident in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The U.S. and Iran have escalated tensions after a Cyprus-flagged container ship was struck by a warning shot in the Strait of Hormuz, prompting Washington to launch airstrikes against Iran. The incide...

item.title: Springbok Flanker Vincent Tshituka's Journey to the World Cup
item.description: Vincent Tshituka, a 27-year-old South African flanker, reflects on his unlikely path to becoming a Springbok rugby player. Born into a family that migrated from the Democratic Republic of Congo, Tshit...

item.title: England Advances to World Cup Semi-Finals with Bellingham's Heroics
item.description: England secured their place in the World Cup semi-finals after a hard-fought 2-1 victory over Norway in a thrilling quarter-final match. Jude Bellingham emerged as the hero, scoring twice to guide his...

item.title: Mob Violence and Justice Issues in Kaduna
item.description: The article discusses recent incidents of mob violence in Kaduna State, Nigeria, highlighting the tragic deaths of individuals wrongly accused of crimes. Mallama Ummulkhairi, an Islamic teacher, was l...

item.title: South African Footballer Jayden Adams Dies After World Cup; Leaked Chats Reveal Final Conversation
item.description: Jayden Adams, 25-year-old Mamelodi Sundowns midfielder, died on July 11, 2026, hours after returning from the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Leaked chats from friend Luphiyo Velebhayi show his final conversatio...

item.title: US-Iran Conflict Escalates as Hormuz Strait Closure Threatens Global Energy Supplies
item.description: The US military launched a third round of strikes on Iran following an attack by the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) on a container ship in the Strait of Hormuz. The incident has led to the c...

item.title: Jaipur Woman Faces New Allegations Over Father’s Death Amid Mother Murder Case
item.description: A 23-year-old woman, Ayushi Sharma, accused of orchestrating her mother's murder in Jaipur to secure a government job on compassionate grounds, is now facing fresh allegations that her father's death ...

item.title: NHFC Marks 30 Years of Housing Progress in South Africa
item.description: The National Housing Finance Corporation (NHFC) celebrates its 30th anniversary, reflecting on three decades of progress in expanding affordable housing access and supporting sustainable human settlem...

item.title: Bandits Kill Four in Samburu After CS Murkomen's Security Visit
item.description: Four people were killed in a bandit attack in Samburu West just a day after Interior Cabinet Secretary Kipchumba Murkomen visited the region to address rising insecurity. The attack occurred on July 1...

item.title: Argentina advances to semi-finals after thrilling extra-time victory over Switzerland in World Cup 2026
item.description: In a dramatic World Cup 2026 quarter-final match, Argentina secured their place in the semi-finals with a stunning extra-time victory over Switzerland. The game, held in Kansas City, saw Argentina dom...

item.title: DHS Officials Subjected to Intimidating Polygraph Tactics During Trump Administration
item.description: A Guardian investigative report reveals that Homeland Security (DHS) officials faced severe intimidation tactics during the Trump administration's immigration crackdown. The study, based on interviews...

item.title: Bellingham's Heroics Propel England to World Cup Semi-Finals
item.description: Jude Bellingham delivered a standout performance as England advanced to the World Cup semi-finals with a 2-1 victory over Norway. The Real Madrid star scored twice, including a crucial extra-time goal...
